# Vendored HarfBuzz

This directory contains the HarfBuzz 11.2.0 source snapshot distributed with
`harfbuzz-sys 0.7.0`. FontSubset compiles `src/harfbuzz-subset.cc` into a static
library so the released applications do not require a system HarfBuzz install.

The upstream project is <https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz>. Its license is
included in `COPYING`.
